Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Min Shuei]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Min Shuei is the Winter Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Min Shuei watched Yerin's battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Min Shuei's sword is a twin to Yerin's.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Min Shuei is also referred to as the Sage of Frozen Blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Min Shuei uses a white sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Min Shuei is a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Min Shuei suggested that Yerin hold the baby rabbit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Min Shuei is present in the room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Min Shuei appealed to several Monarchs to have the Blood Sage removed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Min Shuei believed Lindon could win.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Min Shuei nodded behind Charity while instructing Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Min Shuei directed Yerin to hunt down her Overlord revelation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Min Shuei acts as a peacemaker.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Min Shuei can teach Yerin almost anything.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Min Shuei carries two identical swords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Min Shuei was restrained by Charity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Min Shuei is a character who argues with Charity.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Min Shuei has a silver flash inside her soul that can cleanse techniques.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — Min Shuei is a teacher.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Min Shuei has white hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Min Shuei is irritated by how much the Lindon illusion talks.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
